title: SwarmKitFunnel
description: A reusable per-artifact quality gate: chains structured-output validation -> LLM-as-judge -> optional harness review -> multi-party human approval into one composition. A first-class, standalone artifact (like a skill or archetype) so the same gate can be referenced by id from many nodes/stages. Every layer is optional except `approve`; present layers run in fixed order (validate, judge, review, approve). The automated layers filter and drive a bounded retry loop but never decide — the only exit is through `approve`. The control flow is compiler-owned and fixed; a funnel configures the layers, it does not rewire the graph. See design/details/gate-funnel.md.

validate.description: Layer 1 (deterministic, no LLM): structured-output validation with field-specific auto-correction. A shape auto-correction cannot repair is a retry — the judge never sees malformed input.

schema.description: Path (workspace-relative) to a JSON Schema the artifact must satisfy.

autocorrect.description: Default true. Re-prompt the drafter with field-specific corrections before treating an invalid shape as a retry.

judge.description: Layer 2: an LLM-as-judge governance decision skill that scores the artifact against a rubric. Below `threshold` drives a bounded retry carrying the critique back to the drafter.

rubric.description: Path (workspace-relative) to the rubric the judge scores against.

threshold.description: Default 0.8. Judge score below this is a retry.

max_retries.description: Default 2. Retries before the funnel escalates to a human with the last critique attached — it never drops or silently advances.

review.description: Layer 3 (optional; heavyweight gates only): an investigative harness reviewer. Findings at or above `route_back_at` retry; the rest attach to the human task.

archetype.description: Reviewer archetype ID, e.g. architect-reviewer, security-consultant.

read_scope.description: Read-only IAM scopes the reviewer is granted for its investigation.

route_back_at.description: Default high. Findings at or above this severity retry; lower findings attach and travel to the human.

approve.description: Layer 4 (required): the multi-party human approval set. The only exit from the funnel to `done`.

approval_policy.description: Mirrors SwarmKitApprovalPolicy (design/details/multi-party-approval.md): the rules that must ALL be satisfied for the human gate to advance, plus segregation-of-duties controls.

rules.description: Every rule must be satisfied for the gate to advance.

exclude_author.description: Default true. The identity that authored the artifact cannot approve it (segregation of duties).

on_revision.description: Default reset_all. What a revision does to prior approvals: reset_all invalidates all; reconfirm_changed keeps approvals whose scope was not affected.

min_distinct_approvers.description: Optional four-eyes floor: at least N distinct human identities must approve across all completed role-tasks.

scope.description: The authority exercised by this rule. Every role in `roles` must confer it (validated against the role registry at load time).

roles.description: The group of roles that may exercise this rule's scope.

quorum.description: all = every role in the group must approve; any = one role suffices; {k-of: N} = any N distinct role-holders.
